product_description: Google Forms is a web-based application that allows users to create surveys, quizzes, questionnaires, and other forms to collect information. It is part of the Google Docs Editors suite and is designed to be usable across various devices and for users of assistive technologies.

vendor_resources.justification: This page is the central hub for Google's official Accessibility Conformance Reports for various products, including Forms.

vendor_resources.text: Google Workspace Admin Guide to Accessibility
vendor_resources.justification: This guide summarizes accessibility features in Google Workspace, including Forms, and links to ACRs.
Google's main accessibility page detailing its commitment and approach to accessible products and services.

other_resources.text: Google Forms Accessibility: Tips for Forms and Surveys (Technology Accessibility at Wake)
other_resources.justification: This article provides tips and recommendations for making Google Forms as accessible as possible.
This page from DLF Wiki gathers resources and reviews on the accessibility of Google Forms, including specific issues and general accessibility.
